race.description: Stradbroke Season On Sale Now Class 2 Plate
race.comment: Competitive affair. BARRELLING (1) loves this track and trip with two wins and two placings from just five attempts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Winning rider Maloney reunites in the stirrups and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. The well-related INFLUENTIAL (5) (half to G3 winner Idle Flyer) has placed two of three over this course and distance and maps nicely for this from gate four. In the mix. SIR WINNIE (10) returned from a spell last start with a solid third, beaten 4 lengths, at Ipswich over 1200m. Fitter and should be poised to run a big race. DARK ARTS (8) made nice progress last time out when third over 1350m at this track. Include in exotics.
